title: Short Term Working Capital Loans
h1: Fast-Term Loans to Power Small Business Growth
metaDescription: Short term business loans offer fast funding and fixed payments for cash flow or growth needs. See how Cardiff working capital term loans can help.

blocks.text: Low rates on secured financing
Double our average competitor’s approval
See Our Google Reviews →

Term loans are simple, straightforward, and easy to navigate. You receive the full loan up front. You repay the loan amount plus interest through fixed payments over a predetermined time frame. With the right lender, it can be a fast financing solution when you need cash on hand.

At Cardiff, we structure our short-term loans to match the rhythm of your business, helping you move forward with clarity, confidence, and control. What Is a Short-Term Business Loan? A short-term business loan is a fixed-amount loan repaid over a brief period, typically six to 18 months. Term loans offer payment predictability. You know exactly how much you’re borrowing, the repayment schedule, and the cost of capital up front. Once you lock in your loan amount and interest rate, your payments don’t change or fluctuate. Simply make the same recurring payment until you pay it off.

If you want to pay your loan off sooner than the end of the term and reduce your debt burden, you can do that, too. We offer loans with no prepayment penalties, so you pay less interest over the life of your loan.
Short-term loans are especially useful for:

items: Handling emergency repairs or short-term investments

blocks.text: If you don’t want to carry debt for years but still need access to reliable funds, short-term loans give you financial flexibility without a long-term commitment.
What Makes Cardiff Term Loans Different?

Many business lenders offer funding products with rigid requirements that don’t fit many small businesses. Their applications are long, approvals are slow, and the repayment terms are one-size-fits-all. At Cardiff, we know your time is valuable and your business isn’t generic. That’s why we have short-term business funding options that work for businesses at various stages of growth.
Here’s how our term loan aligns with your unique needs:
1. Fast Funding When You Need It Most
At Cardiff, you don’t have weeks to wait for your loan approval. Our streamlined application process allows you to get a business loan quickly, often with same-day decisions and funding.
2. Designed for Short-Term Needs

Whether you’re preparing for a seasonal surge or stabilizing from a dip, the structure of our short-term business loans aligns with your revenue cycles. We don’t lock you into lengthy obligations that outlast your need.
3. Flexible Use of Funds

You stay in control. Use the funds for working capital, inventory, payroll, renovations, or even to fund growth opportunities. Our financing works across industries, from retail to restaurants, and contractors to clinics.
4. Transparent Terms

We clearly outline the terms of every Cardiff loan. There are no hidden surprises in the fine print or shrouded in industry jargon. You’ll always know the total cost and repayment schedule before you sign.
5. Fair Repayment
Financially responsible decisions should never come with a penalty. Cardiff provides interest-free early payoff options for qualified businesses, so you can clear your loan when the timing is right.
When a Short-Term Loan Makes Sense

Term loans can provide a financial bridge when timing is critical. Unlike long-term financing that’s focused on major investments, you can use short-term loans to solve immediate needs and keep your business moving forward. They offer quick access to capital, structured repayment, and the flexibility to adapt to the natural ups and downs of running a business.
Here are a few scenarios where they can be especially useful:

items: A retail store ordering bulk inventory ahead of the holidays
A medical practice expanding to a second location
A restaurant updating kitchen equipment before a local food festival
A construction firm purchasing materials for a new project
A salon covering payroll during a slow month

blocks.text: In essence, short-term business loans are about speed and adaptability. For many owners, a working capital term loan is a simple, practical way to handle financial needs while staying focused on growth.
Who Can Benefit from Cardiff’s Term Loans?

Cardiff’s term loans are designed for small business owners who need reliable funding without the hassle of traditional bank lending. Unlike rigid bank loans, Cardiff looks beyond perfect credit to focus on the strength of your business and its potential for growth.

Service-based companies like salons, spas, medical practices, hotels, and travel agencies often benefit from working capital term loans to cover upgrades, staffing, or seasonal fluctuations. Product-driven businesses, from retail shops to contractors, can also use this type of financing to purchase equipment, stock inventory, or take on bigger projects.
You may be a great fit for a Cardiff term loan if:

items: Your business has been operational for 12 months
You want predictable repayment terms with no surprises
You’re seeking fast, short-term business funding without extensive red tape

blocks.text: Ultimately, Cardiff’s term loans are built for entrepreneurs who see opportunities but don’t want to wait months for bank approval. Whether you’re expanding, bridging a cash flow gap, or investing in long-term growth, these loans provide the capital you need on a timeline that matches the pace of running a business. Whether you’re a local auto shop or a growing med spa, short-term working capital loans can unlock momentum when you need it most.
Term Loan vs. Other Funding Options
Wondering how a term loan compares to other common forms of financing? Here’s a quick breakdown:
If you value structured repayment and cost clarity, a short-term term loan is often the leading choice.
How to Apply for a Short-Term Business Loan with Cardiff
Getting started is simple. Cardiff makes it easy to apply for short-term working capital loans online in just a few minutes. Here’s what we need from you:

items: Access to recent bank statements through Plaid

blocks.text: Once we have the information we need, our team reviews your application quickly. Many businesses receive decisions and funding the same day. We act fast, so you can too.
Ready to Get the Capital You Need?

Cardiff understands that the financial needs of small businesses often turn on a dime. One day, revenue and expenses appear in perfect balance, and the next day, you are woefully short on funds. You don’t have to give up on your goals or pass up opportunities to expand when capital runs low.

Short-term working capital loans give you the agility you need to take the next step on your chosen path to success. While traditional lenders often get bogged down in paperwork and approval standards, Cardiff takes a different approach. We look at the real performance of your business so we can tailor financing to support your momentum.

Our goal is to provide funding that has clear terms, straightforward repayment, and fast approvals, so opportunities don’t pass you by while you wait for a decision. You can focus on running your business rather than worrying about red tape.
